title: The Blebpack
description: A resource pack for the blebs :)
body:
This is a continuation of the original [Bleb Resources](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bleb-resources) uploaded and maintained by [Jambl3r](https://www.curseforge.com/members/jambl3r) and [Bleb Resources 2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bleb-resources-2) uploaded and maintained by the [BlebCommunity](https://www.discord.gg/gunt)

![The blebpack! A resource pack for the blebs smileyface](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bf044f026e5256fb145766544c0cb4df054932a.png)

![Face off against Vishy! - Find the Boggies! - Ride a Bleb!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11bddc8df50cebb880175e0e7b4f5f5f6d2e8e0f.png)

![An animated divider of various pixel art](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14a22f0074099a466a2a1bdc2514d13630f70afc.gif)
![Experience the 50+ textures, sounds and memes direct from bleb brains!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e955629c6ac125fe826016f7c0e2bc369a23d9b6.png)

## Blebspeak language pack
The Blebspeak language pack adds new names for blocks and items, changes GUI text and debug messages, and gives some mobs new names.

>**This is not enabled by default.** To enable the language, on the Title Screen choose Options >> Language and enable Blebspeak (Blebland Autonomous Region). You can switch back to your preferred language any time without affecting the other resources.

> The mod [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload) can make searching for items in the creative menu and recipe book much easier by allowing you to set your regular language as a fallback for search.

## Custom entity features
Blebpack uses mods to add custom entity models, rare mob variants and other special entity features.  
**The pack will still work without these mods** but these features will not be used.

> To enable these features install [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features).

[Original resource pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bleb-resources) by [Jambl3r](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/jambl3r)  
Maintained by the [Bleb Community](https://www.discord.gg/gunt)  
Uses art from [twitch.tv/hrry](https://www.twitch.tv/hrry)  
This resource pack directly samples ['Rick Roll Jazz' by Bari S](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sR5qJy-wsRE)
